evidence_quotes.quote: These payment providers did not like these games and thus threatened to cut their services if these platforms did not comply.

paragraphs.text: There has been a recent disappearance of media from steam and other similar platforms. This has not been because they have made the decision to remove these games on their own volition though. An effort of multiple payment providers have forced games off these platforms. These payment providers did not like these games and thus threatened to cut their services if these platforms did not comply. I am a firm believer that payment providers have no business dictating what media is being shown. I do not want censorship being enforced by a company. I do not want EU to allow this kind of behavior from any company. I simply want these platforms to have the right to decide for themself what media to show and not have corporate censorship looming over them. Kindest regards!
